operation: First, an XY-aligned workplane is initialized with origin at coordinates (43, -53, 24). A circle of 25 unit radius is sketched on this workplane, then extruded 2 units along the positive Z axis to form a flat circular disk tagged as 'base'. Next, the top positive Z face of the base is selected to create a new workplane, where a 46 unit diameter hole with 2 unit depth is cut at the center. Finally, the top positive Z face of the tagged base is selected again to create another workplane, where a 42 unit diameter through hole is cut at the center.
geometry: The model is a thin, flat concentric stepped annular ring with a circular outer perimeter. It has parallel flat top and bottom faces, with a two-section coaxial inner bore: a wider upper bore section and a narrower bore that runs through the full thickness of the part, with all features aligned to the same central axis perpendicular to the flat faces.
function: This is a low-profile stepped spacer, gasket, or mounting ring intended to align and interface between coaxial mating components, with its wider inner section acting as a seating recess for corresponding assembly parts.
